name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of what you're trying to do that isn't currently possible or is awkward today.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see happen.

**Alternatives considered**
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've tried.

**Scope check**
This project visualizes Claude Code's own transcript format only (see the README's "Scope" note) — please confirm
your request fits within that before opening.
